description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and graphic and rubber print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not bleach Levi's takes its love for the urbane and trendy to a whole new level with this classic T-shirt. Tailored to a beautiful finish, this tee is designed to offer a snug Fit, flaunting your sculpted body. Slip into a pair of jeans and sneakers or suede shoes to complement this trendy-yet-classic tee. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
